title: Boiling Water and Visible Categorification

analysis.object: T568: Boiling Water and Visible Categorification depth analysis

rayleigh_benard.description: Low heat: Rayleigh-Benard convection cells; regular hexagonal EML-3 patterns
rayleigh_benard.reason: Convection cells are EML-3: regular, oscillatory, patterned (Turing-like)

transition.description: Turn up flame: hexagonal patterns break into turbulence; EML-3 -> EML-inf
transition.reason: The categorification is visible: hex cells -> chaos at critical Rayleigh number

kitchen_laboratory.description: Your kitchen stove is the laboratory where NS inaccessibility becomes visible
kitchen_laboratory.reason: Boiling water is the everyday version of NS blow-up; you can watch the transition

analysis.theorem: T568: Boiling Water and Visible Categorification (S847).

key_theorem: T568: Boiling Water and Visible Categorification (S847).
